import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useAuth } from '../context/AuthContext'; import { FiZap, FiShield, FiTrendingUp, FiUsers, FiBox, FiArrowRight } from 'react-icons/fi'; import './Home.css'; const categories = [ { name: 'Motors', icon: '⚙️', desc: 'Industrial & servo motors' }, { name: 'Semiconductors', icon: '💡', desc: 'ICs, chips, transistors' }, { name: 'Defence', icon: '🛡️', desc: 'Defence-grade components' }, { name: 'Electronics', icon: '🔌', desc: 'PCBs, sensors, modules' }, { name: 'Mechanical', icon: '🔩', desc: 'Bearings, gears, shafts' }, { name: 'Other', icon: '📦', desc: 'More industrial goods' }, ]; export default function Home() { const { user } = useAuth(); return (
